title: Faye: A Tale of Shadow
description:
In this turn-base strategy RPG, you can fight demons and Faye, make friends, give gifts, and save the world!

Story:
Shadow looms over the land causing the Faye to rampage! The Priestess calls upon her knights to resolve the problem. Peter, a skilled traveler with nothing better to do, joins the knights led by Kaine to stop the Shadow.

Key Features:• More than 15 chapters, and many optional battles!

• Help Peter befriend allies and even Faye. Maybe he'll even find love!

• Use your items or give them as gifts.

• Levels and experience points are used by some abilities as an expendable resource.

• A charming, classic visual style.
description_short: In this classically styled turn-based strategy RPG, Shadow looms over the land causing the Faye to rampage! Help Peter save the world, make friends, and maybe even find love. Fight against Shadow, choose to use items or gift them, have conversations, and maybe find a few secrets.
